title: creative-faces
description: A creative plugin that allows Minecraft servers to show the face of players in the chat, scoreboard, tab, signs, items and everywhere you can write text!
body:
# Creative Faces

A creative plugin that allows Minecraft servers to show the face of players in the chat, scoreboard, tab, signs, items and everywhere you can write text!

`creative-faces` uses [creative-central](https://modrinth.com/plugin/central), *the plugin that unifies
resource-packs*, and a placeholder system like [MiniPlaceholders](https://modrinth.com/plugin/miniplaceholders)
or [PlaceholderAPI](https://spigotmc.org/resources/6245/)

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ghzB8Af7/images/2e8ac856ec4b13ec9c29703e8a075e45f26edac9.png)

## Features
- Add faces to the chat, signs, anvils, items, guis, everywhere!
- Uses creative-central so you have all its features:
- - Automatically generates the server's resource-pack
- - Automatically upload the resource-pack to a server or host it locally
- - Automatically send the resource-pack to everyone
- Easy to use
- If you use PlaceholderAPI, just use `%faces_face%` to show the player's head
- If you use MiniPlaceholders, just use `<faces_face>`
- Developers API

Check the [plugin's documentation](https://unnamed.team/docs/creative-faces) for more
